execSummary.narrative: 6 months of FY2026 Service activity reported, $2.95M invoiced YTD. Run-rate annualizes to $5.91M against the $6.8M plan, a $893K shortfall (13.1% uplift needed).

actionableRecommendations: Annualized Service pace is $893K short of the $6.8M plan. 13.1% uplift needed on remaining months.
